revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}.
== References ==
{{Reflist}}
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)|version=93996748|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
<!--Okanoue Shrine--><!--Okanoue Shrine--> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q113498535}} [[Category:All disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

revision.comment: adding dummy category to make categories work
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}.

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Okanoue Shrine]] to [[Okanoue Shrine (disambiguation)]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}.

revision.comment: Bot: Adding move templates ({{moved from|Okanoue Shrine}})
Removing from [[Category:Move targets v destinations]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: fix ill template destination links
Bot: Tagging move link quality (moved from a non-redirect)

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town|1=Itano, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District|1=Itano District, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward|1=Asao-ku, Kawasaki}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City|1=Kawasaki, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami|1=Oyamakui no Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City|1=Fukaya, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town|1=Itano, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District|1=Itano District, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward|1=Asao-ku, Kawasaki}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City|1=Kawasaki, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami|1=Oyamakui no Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City|1=Fukaya, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}.
== References ==
{{Reflist}}
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)|version=93996748|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]

'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town|1=Itano, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District|1=Itano District, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward|1=Asao-ku, Kawasaki}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City|1=Kawasaki, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami|1=Oyamakui no Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City|1=Fukaya, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}.

'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town|1=Itano, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District|1=Itano District, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward|1=Asao-ku, Kawasaki}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City|1=Kawasaki, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami|1=Oyamakui no Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City|1=Fukaya, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town|1=Itano, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District|1=Itano District, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward|1=Asao-ku, Kawasaki}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City|1=Kawasaki, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami|1=Oyamakui no Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City|1=Fukaya, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]
'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town|1=Itano, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District|1=Itano District, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward|1=Asao-ku, Kawasaki}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City|1=Kawasaki, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami|1=Oyamakui no Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City|1=Fukaya, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}.
